fileTypeDefaults.description: Map file patterns to chunk types

autoRecall.description: Automatically inject relevant memories before each agent turn

autoCapture.description: Auto-capture decisions/facts from messages. Recommended: false if agent writes manually (84% FP rate observed with Telegram metadata).

halfLifeDays.description: Memory decay half-life in days. Higher = memories stay relevant longer. Recommended: 180 for personal agents, 90 for fast-moving projects. (Upstream default: 120)

excludeFromRecall.description: File patterns to exclude from auto-recall injection (e.g. ['MEMORY.md', 'tmp/*'])

include.description: Glob patterns for files to index (default: all markdown + JSON in workspace)

minConfidence.description: Minimum confidence score (0-1) for auto-recall results
